title: Data Analyst
description:
Job Responsibilities

1. Data Management and Analysis: Collect, sanitize, monitor, and analyze data from bus and rail AFC devices, identifying trends and detecting anomalies.

2. Data Interpretation and Reporting: Apply statistical techniques to analyze data, provide ongoing reports, and visualize insights to inform business decisions.

3. Complex Data Analysis: Identify, analyze, and interpret trends and patterns in complex data sets to inform predictive maintenance and system optimization.

4. Data Visualization and Communication: Present findings in a clear and concise manner, translating complex data insights into actionable recommendations.

5. Collaboration and Prioritization: Work with management to prioritize business needs, develop strategies for process improvement, and identify opportunities for optimization.

6. Process Improvement: Continuously seek out new opportunities for process improvement, leveraging data-driven insights to drive business outcomes.

Technical Requirements:

1. Data Modeling and Analysis: Expertise in data models, data mining, clustering, and segmentation techniques.

2. Technical Skills:

- Proficiency in reporting packages (e.g., Cognos) and databases (e.g., SQL).

- Programming skills in Python and experience with ETL frameworks.

- Familiarity with Python libraries (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Python Dash, StreamLit).

- Good understanding of cloud concepts and cloud deployments

- Familiarity with automation tools (e.g. power automate, N8N etc.)

- Frontend Development: Creating the client-side of applications, focusing on layout, design, and user experience.

3. Data Visualization: Expertise in creating dashboards in Tableau and PowerBI, with hands-on experience in Tableau Server (publishing workbooks, administration settings).

4. Additional Skills:

- Knowledge of Java is a plus

- Concepts and application of LLM & GenAI

Experience and Education:

1. Experience: 2-3 years of relevant experience as a Full Stack Developer, Data Analyst or Business Data Analyst. Fresh graduates with relevant expertise and interest will also be considered.

2. Education: Degree in Computer Science, Electrical/Electronic Engineering, Information Management, Statistics, or a related field.

Notes: Please indicate your expected salary, and reasons for leaving from your past employments.

postedCompany.description:
MSI Global Private Limited is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Land Transport Authority of Singapore.  MSI provides professional land transport consultancy, engineering services and solutions in Singapore and many other parts of the world.  The Company owns a subsidiary in Shanghai.

 

We are looking for highly motivated, results-oriented team players to join us as professional partners to strengthen and realise our vision and mission.
postedCompany.name: MSI GLOBAL PRIVATE LIMITED
